flashcards.definition: A chart using separated bars to display the frequency of categorical (qualitative) data.
A chart using adjacent bars to display the frequency distribution of quantitative data over continuous intervals.
A distribution with a long tail extending to the right; most data are clustered on the left.
A distribution with a long tail extending to the left; most data are clustered on the right.
A distribution with two distinct peaks, suggesting two common values or groups within the data.
